title: Fiery Indian Baby Squid Kebabs
description: A spicy and flavorful Indian dish featuring baby squid, marinated in a mix of Indian spices and double-fried to crispy perfection, served with a side of raw friendly cucumber raita.

ingredients.name: baby squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together garam masala, cayenne pepper, lemon juice, and yogurt to make the marinade.
Add the baby squid to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the squid from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off, and double-fry the squid in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried squid from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together grated cucumber, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
Serve the fried squid hot with a side of cucumber raita.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves and serve immediately.
